name: Protocol Handlers — URL Scheme Hijacking
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Registers custom URL protocol handlers (e.g., ms-word://, skype://) mapping protocol prefixes to COM objects.
forensic_value: A malicious protocol handler intercepts all URI navigations matching its scheme — used for browser-to-application communication exploitation and URI scheme hijacking attacks.
